de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Interface StatementContainer

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    Branch, ParameterContainer, ProgramConstruct
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ArrayLength, ArrayPostDecl, BranchImp, Case, Catch, CatchAllStatement, ClassInitializer, ConstructorCall, ConstructorDeclaration, ContextStatementBlock, CreateObject, Default, Do, DoBreak, Else, EnhancedFor, EnhancedForElimination, EvaluateArgs, ExpandMethodBody, Finally, For, ForToWhile, InitArray, InitArrayCreation, IsStatic, LabeledStatement, LoopInit, LoopStatement, MethodCall, MethodDeclaration, MethodFrame, MultipleVarDecl, PostWork, ProgramSV, ProgramTransformer, SpecialConstructorCall, StatementBlock, StaticInitialisation, SwitchToIf, SynchronizedBlock, Then, Try, TypeOf, Unpack, UnwindLoop, While

    public interface StatementContainer
extends NonTerminalProgramElement
    Statement container. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
